function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_27__eur_000550__inv_0011__helios_followup_support_invoice.md
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — resending the requested invoice from 27-04-2026 (Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH) attached here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound file written successfully; verification checklist passes: attachment path was read, single attachment so newest-first satisfied, recipient matches Claudia canonical email, subject colon safely quoted. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email draft record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md for invoice resend request.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message and completed the requested invoice resend workflow: verified sender identity, identified the requested 27-04-2026 invoice, created an outbound draft to Claudia with that invoice attached, and removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, read applicable AGENTS/workflow docs, treated inbox email header as canonical metadata, used canonical primary_contact_email for recipient verification, processed all preflight-listed related finance files, and deleted inbox item after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to resend the invoice dated 27-04-2026; the matching invoice file (issued_on 2026-04-27, INV-0011) was read and used as the attachment. Sender address matched Claudia's canonical primary_contact_email, and all six preflight-related finance files were processed before completion.
